cost_name: H₂ Compression — Mobility Offtake (30→500 bar) — 100 MW — Europe 2025

estimation.estimation_method: IRENA 2024 + hydrogen refueling station compressor cost data. 30 bar (PEM outlet) → 500 bar (tube trailer or HRS cascade). Multi-stage ionic or reciprocating compressor. Alkaline variant (CS-HPR-002A) would add first stage 1→30 bar (+€70/kW).

confidence.rationale: Hydrogen mobility compression is a growing market with established compressor technology (PDC Machines, Howden, Burckhardt). Cost data from HRS industry benchmarks.

primary_drivers: Final pressure (500 bar vs 900 bar for 700 bar HRS)
Flow rate and number of compressor trains
Oil-free requirement for fuel cell grade
exclusions: HRS dispenser and on-site storage at fueling station
